data.name: Exponential moving average (α=0.2). Recent entries weighted more.
data.value: Exponentiell glidande medelvärde (α=0,2). Senare inmatningar väger tyngre.

data.name: Simple average mood score over the past 30 days.
data.value: Enkel genomsnittlig humörsiffra under de senaste 30 dagarna.

data.name: Simple average mood score over the past 7 days.
data.value: Enkel genomsnittligt humörscore under de senaste 7 dagarna.

data.name: Standard deviation over the past 30 days. Lower = more stable.
data.value: Standardavvikelse under de senaste 30 dagarna. Lägre = mer stabil.

data.name: Tracks mood trends with an exponential moving average (α=0.2), 7/30-day averages, and 30-day volatility (standard deviation).
data.value: Spårar humörtrender med en exponentiell glidande medelvärde (α=0,2), 7/30-dagars medelvärden och 30-dagars volatilitet (standardavvikelse).

data.name: Which event type records your mood?
Which numeric field stores the mood score (e.g. 1–10)?
